sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34236" key="e)/mparsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμπαρσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διάπαρσις</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg008:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.50</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
